IGF-1 (Insulin-like Growth Factor 1) Test 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/igf-1-insulin-like-growth-factor-1-test/ 
IGF-1 (Insulin-like Growth Factor 1) Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is an IGF-1 test? 
This test measures the amount of IGF-1 (insulin-like growth factor 1) in your blood. IGF-1 is a hormone , a chemical messenger in your bloodstream that controls the actions of certain cells or organs. IGF-1 manages the effects of growth hormone (GH) in your body. To
